intro.slide1Body: Whether you're picking up a barbell for the first time or chasing a podium finish, Peak Fettle meets you where you are. No judgement. Just progress.
intro.slide2Headline: Log your sessions. See your rank.
intro.slide2Body: Log your workouts in seconds. We'll show you exactly where you stand compared to people at your level — not the internet's strongest 1%.
intro.slide3Body: Rest days don't break your streak. Only missing sessions back-to-back does. We built it this way on purpose.

healthMetrics.title: Health Metrics
healthMetrics.syncCardSub: Sync resting HR, HRV, sleep, and active calories from the Health app. Used by the AI planner to adjust training intensity.
healthMetrics.healthKitUnavailable: ⚠ HealthKit requires a development build (EAS). Tap to see the setup guide.
healthMetrics.androidNote: HealthKit sync is available on iOS only. Garmin Connect IQ integration (TICKET-029) will provide health data on Android.
healthMetrics.emptyStateIos: Tap "Sync Now" above to import data from Apple Health.
healthMetrics.emptyStateAndroid: Connect a wearable to start logging health metrics.

insights.startDeloadMessage: This will mark today as the start of a deload and update your training schedule for the next 7 days.
insights.pageSubtitle: Evidence-based signals from your logged training and health metrics.
insights.proFeatureBody: Readiness, muscle-recovery and deload guidance are computed from your training on Peak Fettle Pro.
insights.tapMuscleHint: Tap a muscle to see recovery detail and suggest alternatives.

groups.goalNote: A harder goal earns more credits. You can change this once per week.
groups.groupNameRequiredMessage: Please enter a name for your group.
groups.nameTooLongMessage: Group name must be 40 characters or less.
groups.createGroupNote: After creating, share your invite code with up to 11 others. Groups need ≥2 members to start earning credits.
groups.joinGroupNote: If you join mid-week, your first counted week starts next Monday. Your first 2 weeks earn credits at 1.0× regardless of the group's current streak.
groups.title: Groups
groups.emptyStateBody: Create a group or join one with an invite code to start earning streak credits with friends.
groups.groupLimitMessage: You can be in up to 3 groups at once. Leave a group to create or join another.
groups.capNote: You're in 3 groups (the maximum). Leave one to create or join another.

groupDetail.thresholdNote: {{threshold}} of {{activeCount}} must hit goal for group credit
groupDetail.leaderboardNote: Volume logged this week and last, for members who've opted in. Volume isn't a strength comparison — it just reflects how much work each person logged.
groupDetail.shareVolumeLabel: Share my volume in this group's leaderboard
groupDetail.noCompletedWeeks: No completed weeks yet. Check back after the first Monday boundary.
groupDetail.goalChangeNote: Changes take effect at the next Monday 00:00 UTC boundary. Your current week always uses your existing goal.
groupDetail.leaderboardSettingError: Could not update your leaderboard setting. Please try again.
groupDetail.goalLabelActive: {{thresholdCount}} of {{activeCount}} members must hit their personal weekly goal
groupDetail.goalLabelInactive: Needs at least 2 active members to start earning credits
groupDetail.kickError: Could not kick {{name}}. Please try again.
groupDetail.leaveGroupMessage: Your banked credits are kept. You'll be excluded from next week's evaluation.
groupDetail.leaveGroupError: Could not leave the group. Please try again.
groupDetail.leaveNote: Your banked credits are kept when you leave.

cosmetics.proLockedA11y: Pro cosmetics are locked. Upgrade to Pro to unlock them.
cosmetics.proLockedBody: Upgrade to Peak Fettle Pro to unlock gradient backgrounds, animated accessories, premium outfits, and more. Purchase coming in a future update.
cosmetics.title: Achievements & Shop
cosmetics.subtitle: Customise your avatar by equipping unlocked items. Reach streak milestones to earn more — or upgrade to Pro for the full catalog.

csvImport.wrongFileTypeMessage: Please select a .csv file exported from Garmin Connect, Strava, Strong, or Hevy.
csvImport.docPickerMissingMessage:
expo-document-picker is required for file picking.

Run:
  npx expo install expo-document-picker
then rebuild the app.
csvImport.pickerErrorMessage: Could not open the file picker. Please try again.
csvImport.fileSystemMissingMessage:
expo-file-system is required to read the file.

Run:
  npx expo install expo-file-system
then rebuild the app.
csvImport.readErrorMessage: Could not read the selected file. Please try again.
csvImport.matchBody: We couldn't automatically match this exercise. Pick the closest one, or create it as a custom exercise.
csvImport.searchOrTypeName: Search or type a new name…
csvImport.searchExercisesLabel: Search exercises or type a custom name
csvImport.noMatches: No matches — create it as a custom exercise below.
csvImport.notParsedError: Could not read this file as a Strong or Hevy export. Check it is unmodified from the app's export.
csvImport.needsProAccount: Garmin/Strava CSV import needs a synced (Pro) account — your free data is stored on-device only.
csvImport.importFailedGeneric: Import failed. Check your connection and try again.
csvImport.importHistoryBody: Export your history from Garmin Connect, Strava, Strong, or Hevy as a CSV, then upload it here. Peak Fettle will detect the format automatically, import your sessions, skip any duplicates, and flag anything it could not parse.
csvImport.strongSteps:
1. Open Strong → Profile tab
2. Settings (gear icon) → Export Data
3. Choose CSV export
4. Save/share the file, then upload it here.
csvImport.hevySteps:
1. Open Hevy → Profile tab
2. Settings → Export Workouts
3. Hevy emails/saves a CSV
4. Upload the CSV here.
csvImport.garminSteps:
1. Open Garmin Connect on desktop (connect.garmin.com)
2. Go to Activities → All Activities
3. Click the export icon (top right) → Export to CSV
4. Save the file and upload it here.
csvImport.stravaSteps:
1. Go to strava.com → Settings → My Account
2. Scroll to "Download or Delete Your Account"
3. Click "Get Started" → Request Your Archive
4. Strava emails you a zip. Extract it and find activities.csv
5. Upload activities.csv here.
csvImport.storedOnDevice: Stored on this device — re-importing the same file won't create duplicates.

dataExport.sharingUnavailable: Sharing is not available on this device.
dataExport.backupCompleteMessage: Your data has been encrypted and backed up.
dataExport.recoveryCodeRequiredMessage: Enter your recovery code to restore from the cloud backup.
dataExport.restoreFromCloudMessage: This will replace all training data on this device with your cloud backup. This cannot be undone.
dataExport.restoreCompleteMessage: Your data has been restored ({{count}} records).
dataExport.useExportBackupMessage: Server export is for synced (Pro) accounts. Your data lives on this device — use the encrypted backup export below to save all of it.
dataExport.useExportBackupCsvMessage: Server CSV export is for synced (Pro) accounts. On a free account your sets are on this device — use the encrypted backup export below.
dataExport.fileSystemSharingRunMessage:
Run: npx expo install expo-file-system expo-sharing
then rebuild the app.
dataExport.notValidBackupMessage: That file is not a valid Peak Fettle backup.
dataExport.restoreBackupMessage: This replaces the training data on this device with the backup ({{count}} records). This cannot be undone.
dataExport.restoreCompleteDeviceMessage: Your training data has been restored on this device.
dataExport.missingModuleMessage:
Run: npx expo install expo-file-system expo-document-picker
then rebuild the app.
dataExport.title: Export my data
dataExport.ownershipBody: Everything you log in Peak Fettle belongs to you. Export a full copy at any time — workouts, sets, health metrics, plans, and personal bests — in an open format you can use anywhere.
dataExport.ownershipNote: Exports are available on all plans. No data is shared with third parties without your explicit consent.
dataExport.exportJsonSub: Full profile, all workouts, plans, health metrics
dataExport.exportCsvSub: Flat set log: date, exercise, weight, reps, RIR
dataExport.cloudBackupBody: Encrypted on your phone before upload — we can't read it.
dataExport.lastBackedUpOverdue: Last backed up: {{date}} — backup is overdue
dataExport.backUpNowSub: Encrypted backup sent to your account
dataExport.recoveryCodeHint: Enter the recovery code you saved when you first backed up.
dataExport.restoreFromCloudSub: Replaces this device's data with your cloud backup
dataExport.movingToNewPhoneSteps:
1. On this phone: tap "Save backup file" below and store it somewhere you can reach from the new phone (Files, Drive, email to yourself).
2. On the new phone: install Peak Fettle and sign in to the same account.
3. Open Profile → Export my data → "Restore from backup file" and pick the file.
dataExport.proMembersNote: Pro members don't need this — training data syncs to your account automatically. Automatic encrypted backups for all plans are in the works.
dataExport.saveBackupFileSub: Everything stored on this device, one file
dataExport.restoreFromBackupFileSub: Replaces this device's data with a saved backup
dataExport.requiresModulesNote: Requires expo-file-system and expo-sharing (included in EAS builds).

exerciseLibrary.goalInProgress: In progress — log a set that meets both targets
exerciseLibrary.setGoalA11y: Set a weight and rep goal for this exercise
exerciseLibrary.couldNotLoadExercises: Could not load exercises. Check your connection.
